channel.title: Murmur
channel.description: Updates for Murmur, private on-device speech-to-text for macOS.

item.title: Version 0.7.1
item.description:
• Faster dictation: long dictations are now transcribed in the background as you speak, so the text lands almost instantly when you finish — even with the live preview turned off
  • Fixed: a dictation ending on a very short final sound could fail to type its text (the audio was still saved to History)
  • Fixed: AI summaries are now a single clean line and no longer narrate about "the user"
